app.subtitle: Video Editor
adv.title: Advanced Settings
adv.ffmpeg_path_label: Override FFmpeg path (leave blank to use bundled bin/):
adv.skins_subtitle: Choose a visual theme. All skins apply instantly. No restart needed.
adv.skin_saved: Saved. Reopen to see full effect.
adv.skin_hint: Mystical includes animated falling star particles across the app window. All skins apply instantly. No restart required.
adv.custom_subtitle: Pick colors for each property. Changes are saved instantly.
lang.title: Language
lang.subtitle: Select your preferred language. A restart is required to apply the change.
lang.restart_msg: Language saved. Please restart the application to apply the new language.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: For advanced FFmpeg path overrides, skin selection, and system information. Go to Advanced Settings in the sidebar.
settings.auto_open_checkbox: Auto-open output folder after each render
msg.ffmpeg_missing:
FFmpeg was not found. Many features will not work.

Download it from Advanced Settings.
common.no_input: Please select an input file first.
common.render_error_msg:
FFmpeg returned exit code {code}.

Check the console log for details.

Common causes:
  • Unsupported codec for the output format
  • Output path not writable
  • Input file is corrupted
trimmer.subtitle: Extract a specific clip. The highlighted section is kept, the rest is discarded.
trimmer.timeline_section: Timeline  (Drag Green/Red bounds to extract clip · Click track to move Preview Playhead)
trimmer.clip_boundaries_section: Clip Boundaries (Format: MM:SS.ms or raw seconds)
trimmer.invalid_range_message: Keep Until point must be after Keep From point.
splitter.subtitle: Extract multiple segments from a single video into separate output files.
splitter.stream_copy_checkbox: Stream Copy (Fast, lossless, but cuts on keyframes only)
splicer.subtitle: Pick segments from multiple source clips and stitch them into one.
splicer.select_row_message: Click a row to select it, then move.
reverser.subtitle: Reverse clips, sections, or create boomerang loops for memes & reactions.
reverser.full_reverse_desc: Reverse the entire clip from end to start
reverser.range_reverse_desc: Reverse only a selected time range
rotate_flip.subtitle: Fix sideways phone footage. Rotate, flip, or both.
rotate_flip.stream_copy_checkbox: Stream-copy video (instant, no quality loss; only works for 180° and flip)
rotate_flip.nothing_to_do_message: No rotation or flip selected. Choose a transform first.
side_by_side.subtitle: Before/after, A/B comparisons, reaction splits, quad grids.
side_by_side.loop_shorter_checkbox: Loop shorter video to match longer
side_by_side.need_clips_message: Add at least 2 clips for grid layout.
smart_reframe.subtitle: Intelligently crop for any aspect ratio. Follows the action.
smart_reframe.when_uneven_label: When aspect ratios don't divide evenly:
crop.subtitle: Visually crop any region of the video frame. Aspect ratio presets, drag-to-crop, pixel-perfect control.
scene_detect.subtitle: Auto-detect scene changes in long footage & split into clips. Perfect for VODs & livestream highlights.
scene_detect.sensitivity_info: Lower = more sensitive (more scenes detected)  ·  Higher = fewer, only major changes
scene_detect.min_scene_info: seconds  (scenes shorter than this are merged)
freeze_frame.subtitle: Hold a single frame for dramatic or comedic effect. The "record-scratch" moment every editor needs.
freeze_frame.insert_desc: Video plays → freeze → video continues from that point
freeze_frame.at_end_desc: Full video plays, then the last frame is held
freeze_frame.only_desc: Export just the frozen frame as a still-image video
freeze_frame.silent_checkbox: Silent during freeze (mute audio on frozen section)
freeze_frame.bad_input_message: Enter valid numbers for freeze time/duration.
clip_looper.subtitle: Loop a section for comedy, emphasis, or beat drops. Simple repeat, stutter, accelerating, and echo modes.
clip_looper.accelerating_desc: Each repeat plays faster than the last
clip_looper.echo_fade_desc: Each repeat gets quieter (audio fades out over loops)
clip_looper.keep_context_checkbox: Keep video before & after the looped section (loop is inserted in place)
sequencer.subtitle: Arrange, trim, and reorder clips on a visual storyboard. Render a highlights reel in one click.
sequencer.clip_list_section: Clip List  (double-click to edit trim points)
sequencer.stream_copy_checkbox: Stream-copy (fast but clips must share format/resolution)
auto_cropper.desc: Manual crop with live coordinate preview, aspect-ratio presets, and optional black bar auto-detection.
batch.desc_subtitle: Apply the same FFmpeg operation to an entire folder of videos at once.
batch_joiner.desc: Drag-and-drop queue of video files, optionally re-encode to a uniform spec, then concatenate them all in order into a single output file.
batch_joiner.msg_too_few_files: Select at least 2 files to join.
beat_sync.desc: Detects beat timestamps in a music/audio track using FFmpeg, then auto-cuts video at beat boundaries or exports markers.
beat_sync.desc_sensitivity_hint: (lower = detect quieter beats, higher = only peaks)
codec.desc_subtitle: Re-encode video with full control over codec, bitrate, and quality.
color_correct.desc: Interactive sliders for brightness, contrast, saturation, gamma, highlights, shadows, and colour temperature.
converter.desc_subtitle: Convert between any video/audio container formats.
ducker.desc_header: Automatically lowers background music whenever speech/audio is detected, using FFmpeg's sidechaincompress filter.
ducker.desc_attack_release: (attack = how fast to react, release = how long to recover)
ducker.opt_loop_music: Loop music to match video length
dynamics.desc_header: Professional-grade audio processing chain: Noise Gate, EQ, Compressor, De-esser, Limiter.
mgen.title: Media Generator
mgen.subtitle: Generate synthetic B-roll media: SMPTE Color Bars, Countdown Leaders, and Test Tones.
extractor.subtitle: Rip audio from any video. No re-encoding when possible.
extractor.lossless_note: Lossless format. Bitrate is not applicable.
replacer.subtitle: Swap or mix audio tracks without re-encoding the video.
replacer.loop_audio_checkbox: Loop audio to match video length
loudness.subtitle: Two-pass EBU R128. Your masters will hit the target, every time.
loudness.run_analysis_hint: Run analysis first to see current levels.
sync.subtitle: Fix audio that is early or late. Millisecond precision.
sync.offset_hint: Positive = audio plays LATER  |  Negative = audio plays EARLIER
muter.subtitle: Silence time ranges or strip all audio instantly.
muter.no_ranges_message: Add at least one mute range.
mixer.subtitle: Layer narration, music, and SFX with individual faders. DaVinci Fairlight for creators.
mixer.include_original_checkbox: Include original video audio track (as Track 0)
mixer.no_tracks_message: Add audio tracks or enable original video audio.
voice_isolation.subtitle: AI neural-network noise removal. Clean voice from background noise.
voice_isolation.anlmdn_option: anlmdn  (Non-Local Means, good for steady hiss)
voice_isolation.afftdn_option: afftdn  (FFT denoiser, good for tonal noise)
voice_changer.subtitle: Apply creative pitch shifting and vocal modulations.
tts.subtitle: Generate neural voice-overs and burn them into your video.
tts.insert_hint: seconds from start  (0 = from the very beginning)
waveform.subtitle: Visual waveform display. Mark regions, adjust volume, mute sections, and export.
waveform.no_selection_message: Set In and Out marks first.
waveform.no_regions_message: Add at least one region action.
laugh_track.subtitle: Strip laughter using classic FFmpeg filters or advanced AI stem separation.
silence.subtitle: Generate jump-cut videos by detecting and removing silence.
silence.threshold_hint: Try -30 for loud speech, -40 for quiet rooms.
karaoke.subtitle: Auto-detect lyrics · remove vocals · burn word-by-word karaoke subtitles.
karaoke.max_brightness_hint: (max brightness of darkened video; lower = darker)
karaoke.remove_vocals_checkbox: Remove vocals  (FFmpeg centre-channel cancellation; works best on standard stereo masters; may leave reverb/harmonies)
karaoke.install_first_message:
Please install Whisper first:

pip install openai-whisper
shortifier.subtitle: Format any video for any social platform in one click.
gif_maker.subtitle: Two-pass palette-optimised GIFs. Superior colour quality.
webm_maker.subtitle: Target-size two-pass encoding. Best quality for any file-size budget.
webm_maker.two_pass_checkbox: Two-pass encoding  (required for accurate size targeting)
watermark.subtitle: Burn a PNG/JPG logo or watermark image onto your video.
watermark.time_range_hint: (leave unchecked to show for entire video)
watermark.no_image_message: Select a logo or watermark image.
hard_subber.subtitle: Permanently burn subtitles into your video.
hard_subber.ass_note: ASS/SSA files use their own embedded styling.
auto_subs.subtitle: Generate captions from speech using OpenAI Whisper. Fully local, no internet required.
auto_subs.translate_checkbox: Translate to English  (any language → English subtitles)
auto_subs.max_hint: (0 = Whisper decides. Lower = shorter subtitle lines)
auto_subs.burn_checkbox: Automatically burn generated subtitles into a new video file
auto_subs.no_file_message: Select a source video or audio file.
frame_extractor.subtitle: Extract frames for thumbnails, contact sheets, and storyboards.
frame_extractor.fps_hint: (1 = one frame per second, 0.1 = one every 10s)
intro_maker.subtitle: Generate animated title cards. Attach to any video.
slideshow.subtitle: Images → polished video with Ken Burns, transitions, captions & music.
chapter_markers.subtitle: Build YouTube chapter timestamps. One click to mark, one click to export.
thumbnail.subtitle: Extract the perfect frame and export as a thumbnail image. Text overlay, colour boost, and batch export.
thumbnail.seconds_to_folder_hint: seconds  →  saves to a folder for browsing
collage.subtitle: Combine multiple videos into a grid layout. Multi-cam, before/after, reaction compilations.
collage.longest_option: Longest clip (others freeze on last frame)
titles.subtitle: Overlay animated title cards onto footage. Lower thirds, chapters, name tags.
downsizer.subtitle: Input a target file size (MB) and auto-calculate the optimal render settings.
downsizer.permissions_intro: If the target size requires an extremely low bitrate, allow the app to automatically:
downsizer.permission_codec: Change Codec (Upgrade to H.265/HEVC for better compression)
downsizer.permission_audio: Compress Audio (Reduce audio bitrate to save space for video)
proxy.subtitle: Generate lightweight editing proxies for any NLE.
scaler.subtitle: Upscale or downscale to any resolution. Preserves aspect ratio.
scaler.pad_checkbox: Pad to exact dimensions (adds black bars if needed)
scaler.invalid_message: Width and height must be whole numbers.
fps.subtitle: Convert any framerate. Motion-compensated for silky smooth results.
fps.mci_warning: ⚠  minterpolate mci can take 10× longer than real-time.
encode_queue.subtitle: Live view of all background render tasks. Add new encode jobs below.
encode_queue.no_source_message: Browse for a source file first.
presets.subtitle: Save your favourite encode recipes. Run them with one click on any file.
presets.read_only_message:
Built-in presets cannot be overwritten.
Change the name to save as a new custom preset.
presets.no_preset_message: Select a preset from the list.
color_match.subtitle: Automatically match the colour grade of one clip to another.
color_match.source_hint: This clip's colours will be changed.
color_match.reference_hint: This clip's colour style will be applied to the source.
color_match.missing_files_message: Select both source and reference clips.
color_match.not_analysed_message:
Clips haven't been analysed yet.
Run analysis now?
scopes.subtitle: Waveform · Parade · Histogram · Vectorscope. Objective colour analysis.
speed_ramp.subtitle: Constant or multi-point speed ramps. Cinematic slow-motion & hyperlapse.
speed_ramp.pitch_correction_checkbox: Correct audio pitch when changing speed
speed_ramp.bad_input_message: Enter valid numbers in all ramp points.
speed_ramp.too_few_message: Add at least 2 ramp points (start and end).
deshaker.subtitle: Two-pass video stabilisation. Tames even the shakiest footage.
green_key.subtitle: Remove any chroma colour and replace with a background.
green_key.similarity_hint: (higher = more key removed; 0.1 is usually good)
green_key.loop_bg_checkbox: Loop background if shorter than FG
green_key.no_background_message: Select a background image or video.
denoise.subtitle: Remove grain, compression noise, and sensor noise from any footage.
denoise.hqdn3d_hint: Best for compression artefacts, webcam noise. Renders in real-time.
denoise.nlmeans_hint: Best for camera sensor noise, film grain. Much slower but superior results.
denoise.nlmeans_warning: ⚠  NLMeans is very slow. Expect 10 to 20 times longer than real-time.
deinterlace.subtitle: Fix combing artefacts from broadcast TV, VHS, and old camcorders.
deinterlace.field_order_hint: Usually Auto-detect is correct. If output still looks combed, try TFF or BFF.
sharpen.subtitle: Recover detail and crispness. Essential after downscaling or compression.
sharpen.unsharp_hint: Classic photo-lab technique. Separate luma/chroma control. Excellent for all-round sharpening.
sharpen.lapsharp_hint: Laplacian-based sharpening. More aggressive on edges, less likely to amplify flat-region noise.
pip.subtitle: Overlay a face-cam, logo, or reaction box onto any video.
pip.missing_files_message: Select both background and foreground files.
region_blur.subtitle: Permanently blur or censor any region of your video.
region_blur.no_regions_message: Add at least one blur region.
zoom.subtitle: Keyframed punch-in zooms, Ken Burns, pans. The #1 move in every content editor's toolkit.
zoom.punch_in_hint: Snappy zoom to a region at a specific timestamp
zoom.ken_burns_hint: Slow zoom + drift across the entire clip
zoom.keyframe_hint: Define start & end crop regions, smooth animation between them
zoom.pulse_hint: Quick zoom in-and-out for comedic emphasis
transitions.subtitle: Apply cinematic transitions between two clips. 21 effects with adjustable duration & preview.
transitions.too_long_message: Transition duration must be shorter than both clips.
lut.subtitle: Apply .cube / .3dl colour LUTs with adjustable intensity.
lut.missing_message: Select both a video and a LUT first.
dynamics.low_end_boost_for_warmth_cut_fo: Low end: boost for warmth, cut for thinness
dynamics.mud_zone_cut_to_clean_up_muddy_: Mud zone: cut to clean up muddy speech
dynamics.cuts_everything_below_the_thres: Cuts everything below the threshold. Silences room noise between sentences.
dynamics.raises_quiet_parts_and_lowers_l: Raises quiet parts and lowers loud peaks. Makes speech sit evenly in the mix.
dynamics.targets_harsh_s_sh_sibilance_at: Targets harsh S/SH sibilance at the chosen frequency. Typical range: 5–8 kHz.
dynamics.hard_ceiling_prevents_any_peak_: Hard ceiling. Prevents any peak from exceeding this level. -1 dBFS is the broadcast standard.
laugh_track.i_have_installed_the_tools_c: ↻ I have installed the tools, check again
laugh_track.ffmpeg_tools_enable_one_or_m: FFmpeg Tools (enable one or more; they stack)
tts.warm_british_male_closest_free_match: Warm British male. Closest free match to the famous Amazon Polly Brian.
tts.warm_expressive_american_female_grea: Warm, expressive American female. Great for ads.
tts.clear_neutral_american_male_good_for: Clear, neutral American male. Good for narration.
tts.clear_confident_british_male_great_f: Clear, confident British male. Great for explainers.
tts.clear_australian_female_friendly_and: Clear Australian female. Friendly and bright.
tts.smooth_canadian_female_neutral_and_t: Smooth Canadian female. Neutral and trustworthy.
tts.edge_tts_engine_ready_10_neural_voic: ✅  edge-tts engine ready. 10 neural voices available.
tts.edge_tts_not_installed_run_pip_insta: ⚠  edge-tts not installed.  Run:  pip install edge-tts   │  Offline fallback: pyttsx3 (system voices)
tts.quick_style_presets_apply_rate_pitch: Quick style presets apply rate/pitch/volume together.
tts.ℹ_rate_and_pitch_only_apply_with_edg: ℹ  Rate and pitch only apply with edge-tts. Volume applies to the final FFmpeg mix regardless.
tts.export_srt_subtitle_file_alongside_o: 📄  Export SRT subtitle file alongside output  (word-level timing from edge-tts)
tts.auto_normalise_tts_audio_to_16_lufs_: 📊  Auto-normalise TTS audio to −16 LUFS  (broadcast standard)
tts.adds_silence_before_after_speech_in_: (adds silence before/after speech in the output file)
voice_isolation.tip_record_1_2_seconds_o: Tip: Record 1–2 seconds of room noise alone, then use that timestamp range as the noise floor reference.
crossfader.join_clips_with_smooth_transi: Join clips with smooth transitions. Fast mode re-encodes only the overlap, not the whole video.
crossfader.use_different_transition_for_: Use different transition for each clip pair
crossfader.overrides_the_global_setting_: ←  overrides the global setting above per pair
crossfader.freeze_frame_preserves_action: Freeze-Frame (Preserves action, freezes video at cut points)
crossfader.fast_stream_copy_whole_clips_: ⚡  Fast:  stream-copy whole clips, re-encode ONLY the transition overlap
crossfader.10_100_faster_than_standard_f: 10–100× faster than Standard for long clips. Smart-matches audio codecs for lossless passthrough.
crossfader.standard_re_encode_every_fram: 🐢  Standard:  re-encode every frame (slowest, most compatible)
crossfader.needed_if_clips_have_differen: Needed if clips have different codecs, resolutions, or frame rates.
sequencer.add_clips_to_see_the_storyboar: Add clips to see the storyboard
side_by_side.loops_the_shorter_clip_unti: (loops the shorter clip until the longer finishes)
trimmer.load_a_video_to_see_the_timeline: Load a video to see the timeline
chapter_markers.title: Title:
frame_extractor.extract_one_frame_at_a_s: Extract one frame at a specific timestamp.
frame_extractor.output_one_image_file_us: Output: one image file. Use timestamp in filename automatically.
frame_extractor.extract_every_nth_frame_: Extract every Nth frame across a time range.
frame_extractor.extract_the_first_frame_: Extract the first frame of each new scene (auto scene detection).
frame_extractor.create_a_single_image_gr: Create a single image grid of evenly-spaced frames. Perfect for storyboards and video previews.
intro_maker.prepend_an_intro_append_an_o: Prepend an intro / append an outro to an existing video.
webm_maker.lower_quality_faster_encode_h: Lower quality = faster encode. Higher quality = very long but best output.
webm_maker.load_a_source_file_to_see_bit: Load a source file to see bitrate estimate.
youtube.use_aria2c_fast_external_downloa: Use aria2c (Fast external downloader, requires aria2 installed)
youtube.direct_copy_remux_to_chosen_cont: Direct copy  (remux to chosen container, no re-encode)
youtube.re_encode_download_best_ffmpeg_w: Re-encode  (download best → FFmpeg with Encode settings)
youtube.audio_only_yt_dlp_x_with_chosen_: Audio only  (yt-dlp -x with chosen audio format/bitrate)
advanced_settings.saved_reopen_to_see_fu: ✅  Saved. Reopen to see full effect.
advanced_settings.language_saved_please_: Language saved. Please restart the app to apply the new language.
batch.output_files_are_saved_as_original: Output files are saved as originalname_batch.ext  (originals untouched)
screen_recorder.click_on_the_window_you_: 🎯  Click on the window you want to record
screen_recorder.instant_screen_capture_w: Instant screen capture with sensible defaults.
screen_recorder.30fps_x264_ultrafast_out: 30fps, x264 ultrafast. Output saved to Desktop.
downsizer.ready_select_a_video_to_analyz: Ready. Select a video to analyze.
presets.vertical_9_16_for_instagram_reel: Vertical 9:16 for Instagram Reels and TikTok.
presets.shrink_file_size_fast_half_the_s: Shrink file size fast. Half the size of H.264 at same quality.
presets.lossless_encode_for_long_term_ar: Lossless encode for long-term archival storage.
presets.fast_tiny_proxy_for_editing_on_s: Fast, tiny proxy for editing on slow machines.
presets.strip_video_keep_audio_as_high_q: Strip video, keep audio as high-quality AAC.
presets.efficient_vp9_webm_for_web_embed: Efficient VP9 WebM for web embedding.
presets.downscale_4k_footage_to_1080p_wi: Downscale 4K footage to 1080p with best-quality scaling.
color_match.channel_source_mean_std_refe: Channel  │  Source Mean / Std    │  Reference Mean / Std
denoise.removes_static_luma_brightness_n: Removes static luma (brightness) noise within each frame
denoise.blends_luma_across_frames_great_: Blends luma across frames. Great for flickering footage.
denoise.removes_colour_noise_within_each: Removes colour noise within each frame
denoise.denoising_strength_for_brightnes: Denoising strength for brightness channel (h parameter)
effects.top_youtube_social_media_effects: Top YouTube & social-media effects. Pick a category below. No video content is ever lost.
pip.px_or_ffmpeg_expr_w_h_w_h: (px or FFmpeg expr: W, H, w, h)
scopes.scope_right_of_video_side_by_side: Scope right of video  (side by side)
scopes.no_scopes_could_be_rendered_nchec: No scopes could be rendered.\nCheck the console.
sharpen.odd_numbers_only_3_23_larger_wid: Odd numbers only (3–23). Larger = wider blur radius

karaoke.whisper_not_found: Whisper not found. Click Install Whisper or run: pip install openai-whisper
auto_subs.whisper_not_found: Whisper not found. Click Install Whisper or run: pip install openai-whisper
youtube.tab_description: Fetch, preview and download YouTube/web videos. Drop yt-dlp.exe in bin/ or run: pip install yt-dlp
screen_recorder.subtitle: Simple mode for instant captures. Advanced mode for full control.

pip install openai-whisper

Chapter markers copied to clipboard.
Paste into your YouTube video description.

Window-title capture via click is only supported on Windows.

Click-to-pick window capture is Windows-only.

msg.select_preset: Select a preset from the list.
msg.frame_extract_failed: Could not extract a frame. Try a different timestamp.
msg.face_detection_tip:
Automatic face tracking requires OpenCV.

As a workaround:
1. Pause your video at a frame with the face
2. Note the approximate X, Y, W, H coordinates
3. Enter them manually in a region above

For static camera shots, a fixed region works perfectly.

exporter.subtitle: Open any audio or video file and save it with full control over format, quality, and metadata
exporter.no_file: No file loaded — browse to open a file
exporter.no_audio_stream: No audio stream found in file
exporter.no_input: Please select a source audio file.
midifier.subtitle: Convert any audio to a high-quality MIDI re-render with 261 instruments
midifier.install_tooltip: Installs librosa + pretty_midi and downloads FluidSynth + GeneralUser GS SoundFont
midifier.step1_desc: Pitch detection via librosa + pretty_midi (polyphonic onset + pitch analysis)
midifier.step2_desc: High-quality render via FluidSynth with GeneralUser GS SoundFont (261 instruments, 13 drum kits)
midifier.step3_desc: Encode to 256 kbps MP3 via FFmpeg, delete intermediate WAV
midifier.save_midi: Also save the intermediate MIDI file
midifier.run_tooltip: Run the full 3-stage pipeline: Audio → MIDI → WAV → MP3
midifier.no_input: Please select a source audio file.
